pg127-p1-s2: The family must realize that dad, though marvelously improved, is still convalescing.
pg127-p1-s3:
They
should be thankful he is sober and able to be of this world once more.
pg127-p1-s5:
Let them remember
that his drinking wrought all kinds of damage that may take long to repair.
pg127-p1-s6:
If they sense these things, they will not
take so seriously his periods of crankiness, depression, or apathy, which will disappear when there is tolerance, love,
and spiritual understanding.
pg127-p1:
makes the impasse worse. The family must realize that dad, though marvelously improved, is still convalescing. They
should be thankful he is sober and able to be of this world once more. Let them praise his progress. Let them remember
that his drinking wrought all kinds of damage that may take long to repair. If they sense these things, they will not
take so seriously his periods of crankiness, depression, or apathy, which will disappear when there is tolerance, love,
and spiritual understanding.
pg127-p2-s1: The head of the house ought to remember that he is mainly to blame for what befell his home.
pg127-p2-s2:
He can scarcely square the
account in his lifetime.
pg127-p2-s3: But he must see the danger of over-concentration on financial success.
pg127-p2-s4:
Although financial
recovery is on the way for many of us, we found we could not place money first.
pg127-p2-s5:
For us, material well-being always
followed spiritual progress; it never preceded.
pg127-p2:
The head of the house ought to remember that he is mainly to blame for what befell his home. He can scarcely square the
account in his lifetime. But he must see the danger of over-concentration on financial success. Although financial
recovery is on the way for many of us, we found we could not place money first. For us, material well-being always
followed spiritual progress; it never preceded.
pg127-p3-s1: Since the home has suffered more than anything else, it is well that a man exert himself there.
pg127-p3-s2:
He is not likely to get
far in any direction if he fails to show unselfishness and love under his own roof.
pg127-p3-s3:
We know there are difficult wives
and families, but the man who is getting over alcoholism must remember he did much to make them so.
pg127-p3:
Since the home has suffered more than anything else, it is well that a man exert himself there. He is not likely to get
far in any direction if he fails to show unselfishness and love under his own roof. We know there are difficult wives
and families, but the man who is getting over alcoholism must remember he did much to make them so.
pg127-p4-s1:
As each member of a resentful family begins to see his shortcomings and admits them to the others, he lays a basis for
helpful discussion.
pg127-p4-s2:
These family talks will be constructive if they can be carried on without heated argument,
self-pity, self-justification or resentful criticism.
pg127-p4-s3:
Little by little, mother and children will see they ask too much,
and father will see he gives too
pg127-p4:
As each member of a resentful family begins to see his shortcomings and admits them to the others, he lays a basis for
helpful discussion. These family talks will be constructive if they can be carried on without heated argument,
self-pity, self-justification or resentful criticism. Little by little, mother and children will see they ask too much,
and father will see he gives too
